CustomField.description: If checked, this will turn on the function where the Product Family is Superhuman Protocol and the Transaction Source is Store or POS and the Commission is Auto Approved.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked, this will turn on the function where the Product Family is Superhuman Protocol and the Transaction Source is Store or POS and the Commission is Auto Approved.
CustomField.label: Commissions SHP with TX source Store/POS
